title: ExposoGraph 3.0 Execution Scenario
description: Schema for a biologically-meaningful execution scenario used to run the EXPOSURE→FLUX→MUTSIG chain.

description.description: Detailed biological description of the scenario

carcinogen_class.description: Carcinogen class key used for FLUX param lookup

tissue.description: Target tissue name (must be in TISSUE module scope)

genotype_profile.description: Map of gene symbol to phenotype string

exposure_scenario.description: Exposure scenario key (must exist in EXPOSURE module for exposure_class)

exposure_class.description: Carcinogen class key for EXPOSURE module lookup (may differ from carcinogen_class if class names differ between modules)

mutsig_class.description: Carcinogen class key for MUTSIG module lookup (may differ from carcinogen_class)

expected_qualitative.description: Expected qualitative direction and dominant SBS signature
